description: Case style: Analogue watch with stainless steel round case and a rotating bezel Dial style: Black dial with textured patterns, silver and white hands, white accents on the hour marks, circular display of minute markings and branding on the 12 hour markFeatures: Three chronograph displays on the dial for date, minutes and seconds, Tachymeter marking on the dial, date aperture on the 4 hour mark and screws to reset timeStrap style: Stainless steel bracelet strap with double press fold over closureWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: 2 years international warrantyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
